# Hash-Provenance Note — `rf-cbc-002` fixture bundle

**Task**: P1-T4 (multi-bundle-conversion-e1, Phase 1 — Rights-Aware Vendoring & Fixtures)
**Source `rf` run**: `RF-CBC-002` — `rf_run_20260717_rf_cbc_002_pediatric_cds_establish`
(intent `intent_research_20260717_rf_cbc_002_pediatric_cds_establish`; bundle
`bundle_20260718_intent_research_20260717_rf_cbc_002`; local mirror read from
`research-foundry/runs/rf_run_20260717_rf_cbc_002_pediatric_cds_establish/`;
`reviews/verification.yaml` records `passed: true`, `exit_code: 0` for the source run).
**Generated by**: `node scripts/evidence/generate-rf-fixture.mjs --run-dir <RF-CBC-002 run dir>
--slug cbc-002` (P1-T1's generator) — no hand-editing beyond this note. Determinism confirmed:
`node scripts/evidence/generate-rf-fixture.mjs --run-dir <run dir> --slug cbc-002 --check`
reports all 31 files matching regenerated output, exit 0.
**Selection rationale**: per this plan's decisions block, `RF-CBC-002` is one of the four
already-verified, non-legal-flagged `rf` bundles slated for conversion this pass (Phase 1
handoff record `docs/project_plans/expansion/rf-handoff/RESULTS.md` records it: 12 source
cards, 88 claims total — 75 supported, 8 inference, 5 speculation, 0 mixed/contradicted/
unsupported — verified, exit 0, 0 unsupported).
**Derived**: 2026-07-22.

## 1. Content-rights disposition (applies to every passage in this bundle)

Every one of the 12 source cards in `RF-CBC-002` carries the same `usage` block:

```
usage: {allowed_for_public_output: false, allowed_for_work_output: true,
        allowed_for_personal_meatywiki: true, citation_required: true,
        quote_limit_notes: "Short excerpts only."}
```

**No passage in this run is positively confirmed rights-clear for committing verbatim text to
this repository.** Per ADR-0002 / D-EP3-4's rights-restricted fallback, this fixture therefore
defaults **every single passage** to the restricted disposition: the record retains an
immutable **SHA-256 hash** of the original verbatim excerpt plus its **precise selector** (the
sibling `locator` field and the source card's own `evidence_id`), but never the exact article
text itself. This is a uniform disposition, not a per-passage judgment call: 12/12 source
cards → 75/75 extracted passages → **rights disposition: restricted (hash + selector only)**,
0/75 positively confirmed rights-clear.

| # | Source card | Title | Publisher | Evidence points (passages) | Disposition |
|---|---|---|---|---:|---|
| 00 | `src_20260718_rfcbc002_00` | Modified Delphi panel consensus recommendations for management of severe aplastic anemia | American Society of Hematology (Blood Advances) | 6 | restricted |
| 01 | `src_20260718_rfcbc002_01` | Guidelines for the diagnosis and management of adult aplastic anaemia: A British Society for Haematology Guideline | British Journal of Haematology (British Society for Haematology) | 7 | restricted |
| 02 | `src_20260718_rfcbc002_02` | Long-term outcomes of patients with refractory cytopenia of childhood under observation only | Blood Advances (American Society of Hematology) | 8 | restricted |
| 03 | `src_20260718_rfcbc002_03` | Diagnosis and management of acquired aplastic anemia in childhood. Guidelines from the Marrow Failure Study Group of the Pediatric Haemato-Oncology Italian Association (AIEOP) | Elsevier (Blood Cells, Molecules & Diseases, vol. 108, article 102860) | 5 | restricted |
| 04 | `src_20260718_rfcbc002_04` | Treatment of newly diagnosed severe aplastic anemia in children: Evidence-based recommendations | Pediatric Blood & Cancer (Wiley) | 4 | restricted |
| 05 | `src_20260718_rfcbc002_05` | Diagnosis, treatment, and surveillance of Diamond-Blackfan anaemia syndrome: international consensus statement | The Lancet Haematology (Elsevier) | 7 | restricted |
| 06 | `src_20260718_rfcbc002_06` | Allogeneic Hematopoietic Cell Transplantation for the Treatment of Severe Aplastic Anemia: Evidence-Based Guidelines From the American Society for Transplantation and Cellular Therapy | Transplantation and Cellular Therapy (ASTCT) | 6 | restricted |
| 07 | `src_20260718_rfcbc002_07` | Disease progression and clinical outcomes in telomere biology disorders | Blood (American Society of Hematology) | 7 | restricted |
| 08 | `src_20260718_rfcbc002_08` | Diagnostic Value of a Protocolized In-Depth Evaluation of Pediatric Bone Marrow Failure: A Multi-Center Prospective Cohort Study | Frontiers in Immunology | 8 | restricted |
| 09 | `src_20260718_rfcbc002_09` | Cytogenetic findings in Polish patients with suspected Fanconi anemia | Advances in Clinical and Experimental Medicine (Wroclaw Medical University) | 5 | restricted |
| 10 | `src_20260718_rfcbc002_10` | Integrated proteogenomic analysis for inherited bone marrow failure syndrome | Leukemia (Nature Portfolio) | 7 | restricted |
| 11 | `src_20260718_rfcbc002_11` | Diagnosis and Management of Acquired Aplastic Anemia: Consensus Statement of Indian Academy of Pediatrics | Indian Pediatrics (Indian Academy of Pediatrics) | 5 | restricted |
| | | | **Total** | **75** | **75/75 restricted** |

Note: 75 extracted passages is fewer than the bundle's 88 total claims (`claims_total: 88` in
`evidence_bundle.yaml`) because 88 = 75 `source_supported_fact` passages **plus** 8 inference
claims and 5 speculation claims that are downstream RF synthesis, not additional extracted
source-card passages — the same pattern documented for `rf-cbc-001` (74 passages vs. 87 total
claims).

## 2. What was sanitized, and how

Only the **verbatim exact-passage excerpts** were redacted — everything else in the bundle
(claim ledger, extraction cards, report, verification record, RF's own paraphrased summaries,
population/assay/lifecycle metadata, source metadata, locators) is copied byte-for-byte
unmodified, because none of it reproduces the underlying articles' text at length. This was
verified mechanically by the generator's own guard (`assertNeverCarriesExcerptField` /
`assertKnownExcerptsRedacted` in `scripts/evidence/generate-rf-fixture.mjs`), which fails
closed on any unrecognized `quote:`/`passage_locator:` construct rather than silently copying
it — the generator completed without error against this run directory, so no such construct
was found outside the source cards' own known fields.

- `sources/src_*.md` — each source card's `extracted_points[].quote` field (the YAML
  frontmatter verbatim excerpt) and the matching `— quote: "..."` line in the markdown
  "Key evidence" section were replaced with
  `[redacted — content-rights: restricted (usage.allowed_for_public_output=false); sha256:<hash>]`,
  where `<hash>` is the SHA-256 of the original excerpt's exact bytes (both occurrences of the
  same excerpt hash identically). The embedded excerpt inside each `threshold.passage_locator`
  flow-map value was likewise replaced by its own SHA-256 hash — the human-readable selector
  prefix is preserved undiminished in the sibling `locator` field one level up, so no
  addressability is lost. Total redaction markers (`sha256:` occurrences) across all 12 source
  cards: **197**.
- `extractions/ext_*.yaml` — copied unmodified; these extraction cards carry only `text` (RF's
  own paraphrase) and `locator` (selector), never a `quote`/verbatim-excerpt field (confirmed:
  zero `quote:` matches across all 12 files).
- `claims/claim_ledger.yaml`, `reports/report_draft.md`, `reviews/verification.yaml`,
  `research_brief.md`, `swarm_plan.yaml`, `evidence_bundle.yaml`,
  `writebacks/ccdash_event.yaml` — copied unmodified; confirmed to contain no `quote:`
  construct (claim text and report sentences are RF's own paraphrased/synthesized prose with
  `[claim:clm_id]` references, not reproduced article text).

## 3. Bundle hash (fixture as committed)

**Verified**: `node tools/rf-bundle-to-kb-pack/cli.mjs inspect --run-dir tests/fixtures/rf-cbc-002
--module modules/cbc_suite_v1/module.json` exits 0 (88 claims read: 83 eligible, 5 rejected —
the 5 `speculation`-status claims, correctly rejected per `02 §2.3` invariant 10, not a
fixture defect).

SHA-256 computed over the sorted `relative_path:sha256(bytes)` pairs of every artifact file in
this fixture directory (i.e. the mirrored `RF-CBC-002` bundle: `evidence_bundle.yaml`,
`research_brief.md`, `swarm_plan.yaml`, `claims/claim_ledger.yaml`, `reports/report_draft.md`,
`reviews/verification.yaml`, `writebacks/ccdash_event.yaml`, all 12 `sources/src_*.md`, all 12
`extractions/ext_*.yaml` — 31 files total; this note is excluded from the bundle hash as
fixture-derivation metadata, not `rf` bundle content):

```
bundleSha256: sha256:7f968ed99c717e451ef58d14091cbe37879a40fef081a5dae0d4c015cae0ca79
fileCount: 31
```

## 4. Directory layout (mirrors `evidence_bundle.yaml.artifacts`)

```
tests/fixtures/rf-cbc-002/
  evidence_bundle.yaml          (copied unmodified)
  research_brief.md             (copied unmodified)
  swarm_plan.yaml                (copied unmodified)
  claims/claim_ledger.yaml       (copied unmodified)
  reports/report_draft.md        (copied unmodified)
  reviews/verification.yaml      (copied unmodified)
  writebacks/ccdash_event.yaml    (copied unmodified)
  sources/src_20260718_rfcbc002_{00..11}.md   (sanitized — see §2)
  extractions/ext_20260718_*.yaml (12 files, copied unmodified)
  HASH-PROVENANCE.md             (this note)
```

Paths are resolved exactly as `evidence_bundle.yaml.artifacts` declares them
(`source_cards_dir: sources/`, `extraction_cards_dir: extractions/`, etc.), matching
`rf-cbc-001`'s layout exactly (this fixture omits `rf-cbc-001`'s
`passage-hash-ledger.json.txt` — a per-passage redaction ledger authored by hand for that
earlier, pre-generator fixture — since the generator itself now mechanically enforces the
same redaction guarantee at generation time; the required per-source-card rights-disposition
table and passage-count summary above still fully account for this fixture's redactions).

## 5. Non-goals of this note

This note does not reopen this plan's decisions block. It documents only how this one fixture
bundle was derived from `RF-CBC-002` and what was redacted and why — a rights/hash record, not
a clinical-content or rule-authoring decision. Converting this fixture's claims into
`modules/cbc_suite_v1/*.json` rules is out of scope for Phase 1 and is not performed here.
